title: Social
description: NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory, the leading center for robotic exploration of the solar system.
text:
JPL’s social media brings the cosmos to the palm of your hand, showcasing the engineering, science, and ingenuity that power our quest to understand the universe – and our home planet.
Follow along as we share the breakthrough missions, cutting-edge technology, and the teams turning bold ideas into reality!
JPL missions and projects are also highlighted on accounts like NASA Earth, NASA Solar System, NASA Mars, and NASA Universe. View the full list of NASA social media accounts.
Looking for accounts that aren’t listed here? Learn more about NASA’s social media consolidation.
